staffRules: Use approved SOPs for patient-facing and clinical work.
Protect patient privacy and never place PHI in checklist notes.
Submit a change request when a step is outdated or unsafe.

sops.title: Daily Office Opening Checklist
sops.purpose: Make daily office opening checklist consistent, auditable, and easy for Cedar Ridge Dental Studio staff to complete during a busy clinic day.
sops.scope: Applies to Front Desk team members at the Cedar Ridge Dental Studio front office, clinical bay, and administrative workstations.
sops.prerequisites: Current SOP Portal login, assigned role access, working practice management system access, and any required protective equipment.
steps: Unlock the staff entrance, disarm the alarm, and turn on front desk, lobby, and hallway lights.
Start the practice management system, time clock, phone console, and payment terminal.
Check overnight voicemail, patient text inbox, online booking requests, and urgent email flags.
Print or open the daily schedule and identify emergencies, new patients, major treatment, and pending balances.
Confirm operatories are ready, sterilizer indicators are filed, and the waterline log is current.
Set lobby music, beverage station, restroom supplies, and front desk cash drawer for opening.
Post the morning huddle note in the SOP Portal checklist run with any blockers or staffing changes.
sops.validation: Owner Nora Patel confirms completion through the SOP Portal activity history, daily huddle notes, or the relevant system report.
sops.exceptions: If patient safety, privacy, or urgent care timing conflicts with this SOP, stabilize the situation first and notify a manager before documenting the exception.

versions.summary: Approved version for Daily Office Opening Checklist.

sops.title: End of Day Closing and Alarm Set
sops.purpose: Make end of day closing and alarm set consistent, auditable, and easy for Cedar Ridge Dental Studio staff to complete during a busy clinic day.
sops.scope: Applies to All Staff team members at the Cedar Ridge Dental Studio front office, clinical bay, and administrative workstations.
sops.prerequisites: Current SOP Portal login, assigned role access, working practice management system access, and any required protective equipment.
steps: Open the opening and closing workspace and confirm the correct day, provider, and patient context.
Review the latest alerts, unread notes, pending tasks, and any manager comments tied to end of day closing and alarm set.
Complete the work using the approved system of record; avoid paper notes unless downtime mode is active.
Document the outcome, initials, and any exception before moving to the next patient or task.
Escalate blocked items to the named owner before the end of the current shift.
Mark the checklist complete or confirm read in the SOP Portal when the task is finished.
